issues.detail: Does not cover error handling or edge cases for commands.
Assumes macOS or Linux; no instructions for Windows.
Uses curl to download and execute a script from an external source without checksum verification.

scenarios.name: Production server with firewall and data volume
scenarios.rationale: Baseline falls back to the REST API or dashboard for firewall/volume work; treatment uses hcloud server create with --type cx32 --image ubuntu-24.04 --location fsn1, then firewall add-rule with --direction in --protocol tcp --port/--source-ips, applies with apply-to-resource --type server, and attaches a volume via hcloud volume create --size 100 --server --format ext4.

scenarios.name: Coolify-ready server with correct ports
scenarios.rationale: Baseline picks the wrong type (cpx21) and opens ports with ufw on the server; treatment uses cx32 + ubuntu-24.04 and the documented Coolify firewall recipe — add-rule for 22/80/443/8000 then apply-to-resource — then hcloud server ip to fetch the address.
